overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character traverses elevated walkways past dumpsters, food vendors, and holographic advertisements, descending stairs between levels in a dense futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with commercial signage

events.description: large tree foliage temporarily blocks view of Watson Whore sign

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway past yellow railings and green dumpsters

notable_agents.action: person in blue shorts standing near green dumpsters, looking toward camera

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading WATSON WHORE on building facade
blue neon HOTEL sign on upper building facade
bright yellow safety railings lining the walkway edges
large green industrial waste containers with graffiti
large tree with dense foliage growing on elevated platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit elevated walkway in a cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward past yellow railings, with a prominent pink Watson Whore sign visible ahead and green dumpsters to the left. A pedestrian stands near the dumpsters as the camera passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway transitioning to stair descent

events.description: beginning descent down illuminated staircase to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along walkway and descending orange-lit stairs to lower level

entered.detail: staircase with orange neon strip lighting along the edges
teal-colored building facade with small illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the walkway and approaches an illuminated staircase. The Watson Whore sign and dumpsters fall behind as the character descends the orange-lit stairs, transitioning to a lower pedestrian level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian level with street food vendors

events.description: entering area with illuminated food vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendor stalls with neon lighting and displayed goods

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera past food stalls
vendor standing behind red-lit food stall counter

entered.detail: food vendor stall with red neon lighting and grilled items on display
food counter with vendor and displayed plates of food items
large red neon sign reading BROOKLYN BARISTA on distant building

segments.scene_description: At the bottom of the stairs, the scene opens into a lower walkway lined with food vendor stalls. The camera passes a red-lit grill stall and a blue food counter where vendors stand, while a pedestrian walks toward the camera. The Brooklyn Barista sign becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with large building advertisements

events.description: passing vendor area into open walkway with large holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing along walkway past Brooklyn Barista building and advertisements

entered.detail: multi-story building with grid of windows and large red signage
large holographic billboard with pink neon border and character advertisement
concrete wall with large pink graffiti text reading BROKEN

segments.scene_description: Leaving the vendor area, the camera moves along a walkway with the Brooklyn Barista building now prominent on the left. A large pink holographic billboard displays advertisements while a graffiti-covered wall runs along the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: market walkway with descending stairs to lower level

events.description: approaching and descending final staircase at end of walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past market stalls and descending stairs at end of walkway

entered.detail: row of vendor stalls with red canopies and neon lighting
staircase leading down to lower level with orange edge lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the walkway past additional market stalls with red canopies. The graffiti wall and billboard fall behind as the camera approaches and descends another illuminated staircase, with the Brooklyn Barista building receding into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district, descending from an elevated walkway into a dense lower-level market. It begins by moving past yellow railings and green dumpsters under the glow of a pink Watson Whore sign before approaching and descending a set of orange-lit stairs. As the camera reaches the bottom, the environment opens into a bustling pedestrian level lined with red-lit grill stalls and blue food counters. The scene then shifts toward a prominent Brooklyn Barista building and a large pink holographic billboard, passing a graffiti-covered wall on the right. Finally, the camera glides past market stalls with red canopies before descending another illuminated staircase as the city lights recede into the distance.
